title: onosma qandilica
intro: Onosma qandilica, also known as Golden Spur or Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, and are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Onosma qandilica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs.
